prestazioni: Garrett GT2259S turbocharger upgrade for the T-Jet 1.4L (engine code: 312 A1.000) with custom 3D-printed titanium compressor housing, increasing boost to 1.8 bar (26 psi) and supporting 280+ HP on E85 fuel with a bespoke Forge Motorsport wastegate actuator (part #FMWG2259S-TI)

Full Akrapovič Evolution Line exhaust system (part #AB-EVO-595C) with 70mm titanium downpipe, 200-cell catalytic converter, and electronically controlled butterfly valve, paired with a custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ with anti-lag and launch control for the T-Jet 1.4L)

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #AB-595-DFV) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and spherical top mounts, combined with Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers (part #20-01-015-00-22) for optimized track geometry on 17x7 ET35 OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (part #RB-AB595C) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended side skirts, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (color code #M227) and exposed carbon fiber weave on the roof and hood

Custom front splitter by Maxton Design (part #AB-595C-SPLITTER) in carbon fiber with integrated air curtains and a 30mm adjustable dive plane, combined with a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser (part #AB-595C-DIFFUSER) featuring dual 80mm exhaust cutouts and vortex generators

Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats (part #24-63-740-40) in black Alcantara with red contrast stitching, paired with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (part #1034A1B) and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (part #AB-595C-6PT) in T45 steel with chrome-moly gussets and bolt-in design
